meta.title: Where to relocate — scoring 36 countries + legalization

slides.action_title: Where to relocate: 36 countries scored, legalization mapped
slides.idea: From a weighted decision model to the routes that actually work — a couple on Russian passports, 2026

slides.action_title: One model, two questions: is it a good fit — and can you actually get in?
slides.idea: Weighted score across 24 criteria / 7 domains, joined with a sourced 2026 legalization review (residence · golden visa · citizenship · mortgage · naturalization)

slides.action_title: The score ranks fit — Georgia, Portugal and Spain lead
But the passport rewrites the map — legalization is uneven

blocks.heading: Citizenship that works for RF
blocks.body: Only Turkey ($400k real estate) and Georgia (discretionary €300k) run functioning investment-citizenship for Russians today.

blocks.heading: Residence is broadly open
blocks.body: Digital-nomad, rentista and business routes stay open across LatAm, the Balkans, Asia and the Gulf — income thresholds, not blockers.

blocks.heading: Closed for RF
blocks.body: 6 destinations are effectively shut for Russians: Czechia, Italy, Greece, Panama, Malta, Grenada (Caribbean CBI).

sources: sourced 2026 legalization review — see the interactive report

slides.action_title: The payoff: 11 countries that are both open to enter and safe
sources: “easy + safe” = an open residence route for RF × high safety/stability score (top 8 of 11 shown)

slides.action_title: Fit, access and safety point at different countries

blocks.heading: The trade-off
blocks.body: Georgia tops the score but scores worst on geopolitics. Portugal/Spain are safe and pleasant but naturalization just moved to 10 years. UAE is safe with an easy visa — but no path to a passport.

blocks.heading: Why separate them
blocks.body: A single ranking hides this. Scoring fit, legalization access and safety as three lenses is what turns a wish-list into a decision.

slides.action_title: The shortlist splits into three plays

blocks.heading: Base now — Georgia / UAE
blocks.body: Cheapest, fastest residence; Georgia for cost, UAE for a safe tax base while you scout. Neither is the end state.

blocks.heading: EU path — Portugal / Spain
blocks.body: Safe, high quality of life, a real (if now 10-year) route to an EU passport. The long game.

slides.action_title: The best country to score is rarely the best to enter — or the safest
slides.idea: The model's real output isn't a winner; it's three ranked lenses — fit, access, safety — you can weigh for your own situation.
